creator: cmb@pfsense.org
text: The fix here has been confirmed by a number of pfSense users, as we've had it in our builds since the creation of this PR. It's in production on at least several dozen formerly-impacted systems, at least a dozen of which have upwards of 1000 users connected to the bridge interface using CARP IP as their gateway. All the associated problems in 10.x are gone with this. So it should be safe.
